subject: IBPS PO Pre 2022
message: Generated structured questions based on the provided mock paper for IBPS PO Pre 2022[cite: 1].

questions.question: Why do experts believe that India is doing away with its culture of temperance? [cite: 20]

options.a: Due to infringement of law which prohibits juveniles from selling and consuming alcohol
options.b: Because women are also becoming habituate of intoxication nowadays
options.c: Because almost every second drunkard in India is indulged in excessive drinking
options.d: As it is evident that mortality rate has been increasing due to alcohol usage

questions.question: What is/are the consequence(s) of the burgeoning numbers of city bars and nightclubs? [cite: 22]

options.a: Dwellers are deliberately embracing alcohol consumption in their lifestyle
options.b: There is constant fear that teetotalers will also start using alcohol
options.c: There is an increase in ill-health caused by excessive consumption of alcohol

questions.question: Why do experts affirm that regulation of sales and the pricing of drinks isn't enough to deter harmful effects? [cite: 24]

options.a: Even after the formation of alcohol pricing policy, black marketing of alcohol has a strong foothold
options.b: Because the usage of other illegal substances which infuse consumption of alcohol is also increasing
options.c: Curbing excess usage of alcohol is difficult until people themselves want to renounce its use
options.d: The root cause of health issues is proliferation in manufacturing, supplying and promotion of alcohol

questions.question: What is the respective ratio of number of shoes sold of Nike in April and August together to number of Adidas shoes sold in July? [cite: 104]
What will come in the place of the question mark (?) in the following number series? 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, 42, ? [cite: 115, 118]
A boat takes 9 hours to cover 432 km in downstream and 16 hours to cover 288 km in upstream. Find the time taken by boat to cover 132 km in still water. [cite: 137, 138]
In a certain code language: “Grand village party here” is coded as “three two seven five”. What may be the code for “Village Party” in the given code language? [cite: 193, 194]
